title: melica ciliata f. flavescens
intro: Melica ciliata f. flavescens, also known as yellow-fruited melic grass, is a flowering plant species in the grass family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melica ciliata f. flavescens include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a food ingredient in some cultures.
